goal: make polarity and zero crossings intrinsic by introducing a persistent signed field

core_changes.change: add signed_field to SignatureState and persist it in artifacts
compute amplitude as abs(signed_field) while preserving signed_field as the primary branch-bearing surface
compute polarity from sign(signed_field) using thresholded polarity assignment
compute zero crossings from persistent sign transitions instead of short-lived phase-local deltas
run family diffusion on signed_field, then re-derive amplitude, polarity, mode_index, and component summary
preserve current peak/band corridor logic but feed it intrinsic polarity and zero-crossing structure

acceptance_criteria: amplitude is derived rather than primary
zero crossings are structural outputs of signed_field
corridor behavior remains backward compatible on old configs
artifact output includes signed_field and signed-field-derived diagnostics
